# SC-05: Threat Model Validation

**Track:** Security Controls (`SC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Perform STRIDE-based threat analysis across all trust boundaries in the design. Verify that the proposed architecture does not introduce insecure patterns and that identified threats have corresponding mitigations.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 2 | System Design | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent generates, human validates |
| **Agent does** | Generate STRIDE threat model across all trust boundaries; propose mitigations for each identified threat. |
| **Human does** | Validate threat model completeness; approve mitigations or require design changes. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Approved architecture document | QC-03 | Architecture design used as input to threat modelling. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| STRIDE threat model | artefact | Complete threat model mapping threats to trust boundaries with proposed mitigations. | 7 years (DORA) |
| Threat model validation evidence | evidence | Human sign-off confirming threat model is complete and mitigations are accepted. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Security Architect |

Unmitigated high-severity threats block progression. Design must be revised to address threats.

## Dependencies

- `QC-03`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(3) | Identification and assessment of ICT-related threats as part of change management |
| EU AI Act | Art. 15(3) | AI systems must be resilient against adversarial attacks; threat analysis required at design stage |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Security · **Owner role:** Security Architect
